observation: Creator capsule routes now cover static surfaces, prompt DNA, motion storyboard, contact-sheet QA, social card, and p5 creative-coding probes, but creators still need a safe timeline-code handoff for Remotion-style video compositions before any renderer dependency or rendered media enters the repo.
population: creator capsule frontier-adapter mutations for externally-rendered visual workflows
selection_pressure: help a creator turn one capsule into an executable renderer handoff faster while preserving memory, proof, public boundary, and minimal DASH core size

candidates.mutation: Route the capsule into a checked Remotion composition contract and generated ignored TSX stub before external rendering.
candidates.phenotype: JSON Remotion adapter contract plus fixed-canvas proof card and generated .artifacts/creator-remotion-scene.tsx stub
candidates.risk: Could become a fake renderer workflow if it only shows a board and does not generate a real sequence-based TSX stub, or could bloat the core if Remotion/React rendering is added as a dependency.

candidates.mutation: Route the capsule into a Manim scene contract and generated Python Scene stub before external rendering.
candidates.phenotype: JSON Manim adapter contract plus fixed-canvas proof card and generated ignored Python scene stub
candidates.risk: Needs its own checked scene stub and external-runtime boundary before it can be retained without dragging Manim into the core.

candidates.mutation: Route the capsule into a TouchDesigner/twozero tox handoff note with port and local-operator safety checks.
candidates.phenotype: Adapter note and fixed proof card, pending a live local TouchDesigner contract
candidates.risk: Without a live TD smoke contract, it can only document a future bridge and may overstate execution.

candidates.mutation: Route the capsule into a browser demo surface with screenshot QA and rollback notes.
candidates.phenotype: Single HTML demo plus browser proof and deploy checklist
candidates.risk: Can become another static board unless it has a real deploy or interaction path.

candidates.mutation: Route the capsule into a small printable PDF zine for creator process notes.
candidates.phenotype: Multi-panel HTML/PDF proof using existing print path
candidates.risk: May duplicate the poster and one-pager paths unless a distinct remix job is proven.

retention: Retain creator-remotion-scene-route as the public-safe bridge from capsule memory to an external Remotion composition handoff: JSON contract, generated ignored TSX stub, fixed-canvas proof card, and machine gate. Keep older winners in retained_routes so the active candidate list stays focused on 3-5 current mutations without losing regression coverage.
